Add keywords one at a time or paste mult: Add keywords one at a time or paste multiple lines. Remove a keyword by clicking the X on its tag.
Add multiple Epay gateways. In the payme: Add multiple Epay gateways. In the payment methods tab, each method can be bound to a specific gateway via its gateway_id field.
Bind this payment method to a specific E: Bind this payment method to a specific Epay gateway. Leave unset to use the first gateway.
Configure one or more Epay-protocol-comp: Configure one or more Epay-protocol-compatible payment gateways. Each payment method can be bound to a specific gateway.
Display name to identify this gateway.
Hidden from users - click to show: Hidden from users - click to show
Message returned when a sensitive word i: Message returned when a sensitive word is detected
Model mapping values must be strings or: Model mapping values must be strings or {target, visible} objects
No API keys available for this user.
No Epay gateways configured. Click \"Add: No Epay gateways configured. Click "Add gateway" to get started.
Secret key from your Epay provider: Secret key from your Epay provider
This message is shown when a sensitive w: This message is shown when a sensitive word is detected and no keyword-specific response is configured.
View API keys created by this user. Clic: View API keys created by this user. Click a key to reveal the full value.
Visible to users - click to hide: Visible to users - click to hide
When enabled, model responses are scanne: When enabled, model responses are scanned before being returned to the user.
When enabled, the response is immediatel: When enabled, the response is immediately stopped when a sensitive word is detected. When disabled, sensitive words in the output are replaced with placeholders instead.
